description: Labs64 GmbH is an IT services company based in Germany. Its website describes consulting, outsourcing, and product offerings such as NetLicensing, but the programmatic interfaces referenced from the site belong to other domains rather than labs64.com.
summary: labs64.com itself exposes no documented developer integration surfaces; the site is a corporate website that links out to separate product domains such as netlicensing.io and labs64.io.
